extension_description.message: A Chrome browser extension that downloads synchronized lyrics from Suno.com in LRC or SRT formats.

download_lyric.description: Download button text for synchronized lyrics

popup_subtitle.message: Open a Suno song page, then download synced lyrics from the song cover.

popup_demo_alt.message: Demo showing where the LRC and SRT download buttons appear on a Suno song cover.
popup_demo_alt.description: Alt text for the popup demo image

popup_status_loading.description: Popup status while checking the active tab

popup_status_not_suno.message: Open Suno and choose a song detail page to start.
popup_status_not_suno.description: Popup status when the active tab is not Suno

popup_status_suno_page.message: You are on Suno. Open a song detail page whose URL starts with /song/.
popup_status_suno_page.description: Popup status when the active tab is Suno but not a song page

popup_status_song_page.message: Song page detected. You can search for the download buttons now.
popup_status_song_page.description: Popup status when the active tab is a Suno song page

popup_status_unknown.message: Open a Suno song detail page to use this extension.
popup_status_unknown.description: Popup status when the active tab cannot be identified

popup_button_find_buttons.description: Button label for manually finding injected download buttons

popup_feedback_triggered.message: Done. Look for LRC and SRT on the top of the song cover.
popup_feedback_triggered.description: Feedback after manually triggering the content script

popup_feedback_trigger_failed.message: Could not reach the Suno page. Refresh the tab, then try again.
popup_feedback_trigger_failed.description: Feedback when the popup cannot message the Suno tab

popup_feedback_no_tab.message: No active browser tab was found.
popup_feedback_no_tab.description: Feedback when there is no active tab

popup_steps_heading.description: Heading for the popup usage steps

popup_step_login_title.description: Step title for signing in to Suno

popup_step_login_body.message: Use your existing Suno account in this browser.
popup_step_login_body.description: Step body for signing in to Suno

popup_step_open_title.description: Step title for opening a song page

popup_step_open_body.message: The URL should look like https://suno.com/song/...
popup_step_open_body.description: Step body for opening a Suno song page

popup_step_download_body.message: The buttons appear at the top of the song cover after lyrics are found.

popup_troubleshooting_heading.message: If you do not see buttons

popup_troubleshooting_login.message: Make sure you are signed in to Suno.

popup_troubleshooting_song_page.message: Use a song detail page, not the home, create, or playlist page.

popup_troubleshooting_cover.message: Wait for the song cover to finish loading, or refresh the page.

popup_troubleshooting_aligned.message: Some songs do not provide synchronized lyric timing data.
popup_troubleshooting_aligned.description: Troubleshooting tip for songs without synchronized timing data

popup_footer_tip.message: Tip: LRC is for music players. SRT is for subtitles and video editors.
popup_footer_tip.description: Popup footer tip explaining LRC and SRT formats
